response:
Nurse Emily has organized a creative writing workshop for 24 residents, dividing them into 4 groups of 6. Each group will receive 3 writing prompts initially, totaling $4 \times 3 = 12$ prompts. Additionally, Emily has prepared 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among all 4 groups, which means each group will get $10 \div 4 = 2.5$ prompts. Since prompts must be whole numbers, we round up to ensure fairness, resulting in 3 prompts per group from the extra set. This gives a total of $4 \times 3 = 12$ initial prompts and $4 \times 3 = 12$ extra prompts, for a total of $24$ writing prompts. 

The library contains a variety of resources that support the creative process, and the library plays a vital role in fostering a supportive environment for the residents. The library also serves as a central location where the writing prompts can be accessed and shared. 

The END.
